programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: A "lurker" zombie looks okay on the surface, but contains hidden water damage under its skin; fixing it up becomes a race against the weather, as frequent rains start to penetrate the house and destroy the upgrades mid-flip.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team finds a rundown house on a prime lakefront lot with the potential for a nice six-figure payday, but the decaying home has become a haven for wild critters that threaten to throw the flip for a loop.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Dolmar scores a great deal in a hot neighborhood, but this tiny disaster is barely standing, rotting wood, leaning walls, and a failing foundation; can the Zombie team bring it back to life? Or will their profits sink with the house?

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: The master of flipping, James Dainard, and longtime rival Jared decide to bury the hatchet and partner on a 100-year-old zombie house trashed by squatters. The property has huge potential, but it's in rough shape and needs a full overhaul-including restoring its original character and finishing the entire basement to push the value well past a million dollars. James has a strict plan to keep the n

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Married in Blue Ridge and now looking to put down roots, Jason amd Michael have outgrown their first home; topping their wish list is a chef's kitchen, swimming pool, and space to entertain but when all three homes show up sleek, luxe, and turnkey, it ultimately comes down to the perfect view.

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Gail is boldly stepping into her next chapter, leaving the big city (and her ex) behind to reconnect with her small-town roots; from a modern stunner wrapped in glass to a rustic reminder of her childhood, which home will help Gail get her groove back?

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: "Dottie the Body" lost her confidence when a large bump started growing between her thighs; Dr. Lee brings in a new, young doctor to help Tim with his big, bumpy nose; Karime is insecure about her birthmark that looks like a black eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dr. Lee asks Dr. Zoe to help double-team needle-shy Mary Ann's crusty skin; Isaiah's mom is concerned he is ignoring the growing lump over his lower spine; Maressa worries about the dangers of treating the oozing skin covering her ankles and body.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dr. Lee and a medical student trainee help Emil and his wife, who are afraid the bump and lesion on his back might be cancerous.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi's store reopens; Dave sets an auction record, while Darrell feels the pressure; Barry hopes an old top hat will yield some magic.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In the desert climes of Lancaster, Calif., Nabila Haniss strikes it big while Dave Hester ends up feeling like a fifth wheel.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers scour a hippie town for 1970s memorabilia; Barry uncovers a relic from his past; Darrell finds a medical device with profit potential.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Hemet, Calif., Jarrod and Brandi locate a tattoo locker and Dave hopes for a big payday; Barry showers Dave with kindness.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi uncover a sweet locker in Santa Ana, Calif.; Mary looks for something more collectible; Darrell's find may equal another big win for the Gambler.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders head to Rancho Cucamonga, Calif.; Ivy opens his wallet for the right locker; buyers Darrell and Brandon stay hungry.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The city of Hemet reminds Kenny of a certain English poet, but he ends up focusing on the Eastern arts; Ivy spreads holiday joy as he battles it out with a new buyer who isn't all that intimidated.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A fearless new wave of buyers hits the auction block joining the hunt for the perfect locker; their high-stakes gambles and headline-making profits prove the next generation is ready to shake up the Storage Wars scene.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny gets ganged up on in Riverside by the field of buyers. Dave buys an old unit and takes a voyage back in time. Ivy scores a locker that inspires him to go clubbing. Emily puts her foot down with a statement buy on a massive locker.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Revival
programme.desc: Willie and the boys raid a junkyard to build a biking track for the littles. Will and Abby get a lesson in family dynamics after moving back in with Willie and Korie. Plus, Bella and Jacob open up about having kids, all while navigating some unconventional advice from Uncle Si and Rebecca.

programme.desc: Lisa keeps getting her lockers taken from her, and it makes her hopping mad; Kenny goes in for a banjo but comes out with a harmonica; Dusty and Lupe find the locker of her dreams; Ivy finds a vehicle in his locker, just not the one he expected.
